prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次约 8442→6895→33671→13090→10983，2023 年出现异常断档（33671），2024 年迅速恢复至 13090，2025 年进一步回升至 10983，近两年呈明显恢复上升趋势，2025 年基准约 10983 名；本省物理类计划 2021–2025 年分别为 33→37→37→39→44 人，持续小幅扩招；2026 年计划 51 人，较 2025 年增加 7 人（+15.9%），扩招幅度为近年最大，理论上竞争有所加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜 2026 年约第 59 名，近年排名稳定在 50–60 区间，学校综合实力处于全国中上水平；2026 年声誉评价为中性/混合，主要事件为宿舍楼安装安检引发讨论，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第 41 位（较热），短视频平台关注度中等偏上，对报考有一定正向支撑；新闻传播学 A、工商管理 A、应用经济学 A-、中国语言文学 A-、生物学 A-、药学 A-，经管文法医多学科协调发展，学科实力均衡。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业 2026 年均为高热推荐，与该校物理类招生专业高度契合，热门专业吸引力强；黑龙江省 2026 年高考总人数约 16.7 万，较 2025 年（约 17.2 万）略有减少，整体竞争压力略有缓解；暨南大学位于广东广州，属南方热门地域，对北方考生有一定跨省吸引力；该校在黑龙 江招生规模较小（物理类 51 人），属省外招生，地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合近两年位次强劲回升趋势、2026 年大幅扩招（+15.9%）带来的竞争加剧、热门工科专业持续高热以及本省考生总数略有下降等因素，在 2025 年基准 10983 名基础上预计位次继续上移；预测最低位次约 12082 名，区间 11582–12582 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 8442→6895→33671→13090→10983. An abnormal drop occurred in 2023 (33671), but it quickly recovered to 13090 in 2024 and further rose to 10983 in 2025, showing a clear recovery and upward trend in the past two years. The baseline for 2025 is about 10983. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 33→37→37→39→44, with continuous slight expansion. The 2026 plan is 51, an increase of 7 (+15.9%) compared to 2025, the largest expansion in recent years, theoretically intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 59th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, stable in the 50–60 range in recent years, indicating a mid-to-upper national comprehensive strength. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with the main event being discussions triggered by the installation of security checks in dormitories, without major negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranks 41st (relatively hot), with above-average attention on short video platforms, providing some positive support for applications. Journalism and Communication A, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A-, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Biology A-, Pharmacy A-, with coordinated development of economics, management, law, medicine, and multiple disciplines, showing balanced academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are all highly recommended in 2026, highly aligned with the university's Physics Category enrollment majors, with strong appeal of popular majors. The total number of college entrance exam takers in Heilongjiang Province in 2026 is about 167,000, slightly decreasing from about 172,000 in 2025, slightly easing overall competition pressure. Jinan University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, a popular southern region, with some cross-provincial appeal to northern candidates. The university's enrollment scale in Heilongjiang is small (51 for Physics Category), belonging to out-of-province enrollment, with limited influence from regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong recovery trend in rankings over the past two years, intensified competition due to the significant expansion in 2026 (+15.9%), sustained high popularity of engineering majors, and a slight decrease in the total number of provincial candidates, the ranking is expected to continue rising from the 2025 baseline of 10983. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 12082, with a range of 11582–12582.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 12082, range 11582–12582. It is recommended that candidates within the range focus on Tier 2 economics and management majors (Accounting, Economics, Financial Engineering) as the main choice, with Tier 1 Computer Science/Artificial Intelligence/Clinical Medicine as reach options. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<11582) can focus on Tier 1 flagship majors. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit (>12582) are advised to use Tier 3 engineering majors as safety options, while paying attention to admission opportunities brought by the expansion.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1230→1312→1660→2031→1719, showing an overall backward trend. After reaching a peak of 2031 in 2024, it slightly recovered to 1719 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 489 positions over the past 5 years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 1719. The provincial History Category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 24→22→20→22→20, showing an overall decreasing trend. The 2026 plan is only 14, a decrease of 6 (-30%) from 2025, indicating a significant reduction and intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 59th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with stable rankings in the 50-60 range in recent years, indicating a medium-to-upper level of comprehensive strength nationwide. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed, with the main event being discussions triggered by the installation of security checks in dormitories, without major negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranks 41st (relatively hot), with medium-to-high attention on short video platforms. Journalism and Communication A, Business Administration A, Chinese Language and Literature A-, with outstanding strength in liberal arts disciplines, strongly attracting liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, Law is in a state of differentiation and wait-and-see, Chinese Language/Literature is recommended, and Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged. The History Category enrollment majors at this university mainly include Law, Chinese Language and Literature, and Chinese Language, with Chinese-related majors showing a positive trend. The total number of Gaokao candidates in Heilongjiang Province in 2026 is approximately 167,000, slightly decreasing from 2025, easing overall competition pressure. Jinan University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, a popular southern region, attracting some cross-provincial interest from northern candidates. The university only enrolls 14 students in History Category in Heilongjiang, a very small-scale out-of-province enrollment, and competition will further intensify after the reduction.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the overall backward trend in rankings in recent years, the significant reduction in enrollment in 2026 (-30%) leading to intensified competition, the appeal of strong liberal arts disciplines, and the slight decrease in the total number of candidates in the province, the ranking is expected to slightly increase from the 2025 baseline of 1719. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1440, with a range of 1181-1699.
